payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it represents the most recent (newer) version. The older match (mem_old) was filtered out because it is marked as superseded by mem_new, indicating the newer memory should take precedence.
payload.decision: Select mem_new (Sam at Goldman) and filter out mem_old because mem_old is superseded by a newer, higher-priority memory.

entity_resolution.reason: Both mem_new and mem_old refer to the same target person (Sam) and the same organization (Goldman), so the system treats them as conflicting versions and applies supersession filtering.

payload.intent: Explain recall conflict resolution for Sam associated with Goldman where the newer memory is selected and the older one is filtered as superseded.

memory_cards.statement: Sam is associated with Goldman (older version).

details: Applied supersession filtering: mem_old excluded because superseded by mem_new

repair_options: Verify the timestamps/priority metadata that mark mem_old as superseded.
Ensure mem_new fully captures the intended details; if not, update or add a corrected memory rather than relying on the superseded one.
Inspect entity linking rules (Sam ↔ Goldman) to confirm the older and newer cards are correctly grouped as the same fact.
